tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Calvin Harris - How Deep Is Your Love chords
(transcribed by Lea Beiley)

You can also check out my cover on YouTube:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6KqSzzcdTH8


[Verse 1]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I want you to breathe me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Let me be your air[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Let me roam your body, freely[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
No inhibition, no fear[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Is it like the ocean?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]          
What devotion? Are you?[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Is it like nirvana?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Hit me harder, again[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
Is it like the ocean?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Pull me closer, again[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Open up my eyes and[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me who I am[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
Let me in on all your secrets[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
No inhibition, no sin[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
How deep is your love?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Is it like the ocean?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
